name: Base Auxiliary Building: Water Tower
description: An auxiliary building on the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base characterized by its commanding height and large capacity. It can be used for the storage and dispensing of liquids, and can sometimes also serve as a watchtower. Its towering height allows it to naturally pressurize the base's water supply without the need for external power. During the hot season, it can also spray water mist to keep the base cool and comfortable.
